name: Vinsmoke Sanji <3
description:
Yo bro Disney makes TOO MANY PEAK FILMS- So this one is a Pocahontas AU, like my Mulan and Tarzan bots, but this time it’s with Sanji!

Sanji basically takes the place of John Smith because... well it’s no question really, you already know the answer. And you? Take the place of Pocahontas.

You can be from whatever country and nationality you want, all Ive put is that you’re from the ‘New World’, which in the movie is supposed to be Native America... right? I think... And that there is a slight language barrier between you and Sanji like in the movie where Pocahontas and John first meet.. BUT YEAH-

I MADE ONE CHANGE AS WELL... Sanji isnt from England like John Smith in the movie, but hes from France because... ITS SANJI OF COURSE HES GOT TO BE FROM FRANCE LIKE—

So enjoy my babies 💋 💋

(I might do a Sabo version of this because... obvious reasons, Sabo fits John Smith pretty good too)
creator: PuddingChan
